sections.heading: 1. Our Commitment to Privacy
sections.body: ToolCraft is built with privacy as a core principle. All tools run entirely in your browser. When you convert an image, edit a PDF, or format JSON, your files and data never leave your device. We do not upload, store, or have access to your files.

sections.heading: 2. Information We Collect
sections.body: We collect minimal information to operate and improve the site:
list: Usage analytics — anonymous page views and tool usage via Google Analytics (no personal data)
Cookies — for analytics, ad delivery (Google AdSense), and preferences
Server logs — standard web server access logs (IP address, browser type, pages visited)
sections.footer: We do not collect: names, email addresses, file contents, or any personally identifiable information.

sections.heading: 3. How We Use Information
list: To understand which tools are most popular and improve them
To display relevant advertisements via Google AdSense
To maintain the security and performance of our servers

sections.heading: 4. Third-Party Services
sections.body: We use the following third-party services that may set cookies:
list: Google AdSense — serves advertisements based on interests and browsing history. See Google's Privacy Policy.

sections.heading: 5. Your Choices
list: You can disable cookies in your browser settings
You can opt out of personalized ads via Google's Ad Settings
All tools work fully without cookies enabled

sections.heading: 6. Contact
sections.body: For privacy-related questions, contact us at privacy@toolcraftbox.com.

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By using ToolCraft ("the Service"), you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the Service.

sections.heading: 2. Description of Service
sections.body: ToolCraft provides free online tools for image conversion, PDF manipulation, Markdown editing, and developer utilities. All tools run in your browser — files are processed locally on your device.

sections.heading: 3. Acceptable Use
list: Use the Service for any illegal purpose
Attempt to disrupt or overload the Service
Reverse engineer or scrape the Service
Use automated tools to access the Service without permission

sections.heading: 4. Intellectual Property
sections.body: The ToolCraft website, code, and design are protected by copyright. The tools process your files locally — we do not claim ownership of your content.

sections.heading: 5. Disclaimer of Warranties
sections.body: The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that the Service will be error-free, uninterrupted, or meet all your requirements.

sections.heading: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: ToolCraft shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use or inability to use the Service. As all file processing is done locally in your browser, we cannot be responsible for data loss or file corruption.

sections.heading: 7. Changes to Terms
sections.body: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

sections.heading: 8. Contact
sections.body: For questions about these terms, contact legal@toolcraftbox.com.
